command:
KEY='/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge'
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205 '
python3 -c "
import pathlib
lines = pathlib.Path("/home/jose/.local/bin/moreno-gmail-bridge").read_text().split(chr(10))
# Show lines from run_delegate onwards
in_run = False
for i, line in enumerate(lines):
    if "def run_delegate" in line:
        in_run = True
    if in_run:
        print(f"{i+1:4d}: {line}")
    if i > 400:
        break
" 2>&1
' 2>&1
echo DONE_2012
